Cell.Data: RIU1 RIU2 AtoDGainFactor (doubled for GaAs CSSs per DN-HORNET-CDH-052) CSS #1
RIU1 RIU2 AtoDGainFactor (doubled for GaAs CSSs per DN-HORNET-CDH-052) CSS #1
CycleMask, GPS Command Cycle Mask (10 Hz)
FrameMask, GPS Frame Mask, Every Frame 1 - 15
The Following Values Are Design Values (Perfect Alignment) based on DN-SERAPHIM-GNC-001 rev A Sect. 4.2.1.2
DcmIruToGyr[GYRD], ND Accelerometer DCMs: Design Values (Perfect Alignment) based on DN-SERAPHIM-GNC-326 Sect. 4.5.3
DcmIruToAcc[ACCD], ND SSIRU Frame location in the SC frame Reference: SER-GNC-MEMO-005 SSIRU Location Table 2

IruPositionScFrame, m Accelerometer ECM positions in the SSIRU coordinate frame relative to the origin Accelerometer positions based on Seraphim SSIRU Accelerometer Locations Rev A Reference: SER-GNC-MEMO-005 SSIRU Location Table 1
[(m/s)/LSB, ACCA ] AccelScaleFactor[0], SSIRU EICD - 6B04982 Rev A Section 4.6.2.8
[(m/s)/LSB, ACCB ] AccelScaleFactor[1], SSIRU EICD - 6B04982 Rev A Section 4.6.2.8
[(m/s)/LSB, ACCB ] AccelScaleFactor[2], SSIRU EICD - 6B04982 Rev A Section 4.6.2.8
[(m/s)/LSB, ACCB ] AccelScaleFactor[3], SSIRU EICD - 6B04982 Rev A Section 4.6.2.8
[m/s, ACCA ] Fdc.AccelGlitchThr[0] [2 x BRE Capability at EOL]
